title: Arch builds bridge to new class of medicines, leading $50M investment in the AI-enabled Vilya
summary: ARCH Venture Partners is leading a $50 million Series A round for Vilya, a Seattle-based biotech founded on David Baker's computational protein design technology from the University of Washington's Institute of Protein Design. Vilya plans to use machine learning and in silico molecular design to create macrocyclic peptides that combine the advantages of small molecules with larger protein therapeutics, potentially rendering high-throughput screening obsolete.
